Class Game

java.lang.Object
game.Game
public class Game extends Object
Main game class that manages the game loop and level transitions.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Game(String[] args, String name)
    Constructs a new Game instance.

    Main entry point for the game.

    Advances the game to the next level.

    Sets the game state.

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(String[] args, String name) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Constructs a new Game instance.
      Parameters:
      args - Array of level file paths.
      name - The name of the player.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException

  • Method Details

    • setGameOn

      public void setGameOn(boolean status)
      Sets the game state.
      Parameters:
      status - true if the game is running, false otherwise.

    • getGameOn

      public boolean getGameOn()
      Checks if the game is currently running.
      Returns:
      true if the game is on, false otherwise.

    • nextLevel

      public void nextLevel()
      Advances the game to the next level. Preserves player stats (score, lives) across levels.

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Main entry point for the game.
      Parameters:
      args - Command line arguments containing level file paths.
